description: Warning budget defines acceptable warning counts per category

verify_repo.notes: Legacy continuity packs create warning flood - known debt

script_health.notes: All registered scripts must exist and compile

raw_subprocess.notes: All subprocess calls must go through command gateway

stale_truth.notes: Truth claims older than 24h are stale

registry_drift.notes: Some unregistered scripts acceptable during bootstrap

verify_repo_warnings.remediation: Clean up continuity packs or exclude from scan

enforcement_rules.description: Blockers must be zero for PASS
